_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.

clinical_thresholds.value: pneumaturia and/or faecaluria and passage of urine through the anus
clinical_thresholds.note: Patient must present with these symptoms.

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure.

ppd_preauth.q: Does the patient present with pneumaturia and/or faecaluria and the passage of urine through the anus?
Was there any evidence of Cystoscopy + Sigmoidoscopy suggestive of urethrorectal fistula?
Was detailed Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure are submitted?
Was the Cystoscopy + Sigmoidoscopy report submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?

common_queries: Patient does not present with pneumaturia, faecaluria, or passage of urine through the anus
No evidence from Cystoscopy + Sigmoidoscopy report suggestive of urethrorectal fistula
Clinical notes are missing, incomplete, or lack evaluation findings, indication for procedure, planned line of management, or advise at pre-authorization
Cystoscopy + Sigmoidoscopy report not submitted at pre-authorization
Indoor case papers (ICPs) are missing, incomplete, or lack daily vitals and line of treatment at claim submission
Operative notes are missing or incomplete at claim submission
Discharge summary is missing or lacks follow-up advise at claim submission

clinical_key_pointers: Previous history of prostate surgery in males
additional_information.referral_criteria: Decide referral of cases to the appropriate level of care (as required) for treatment of patients under PMJAY
